label: Bold Startup
description: Launch-oriented landing pages with strong contrast, velocity, and product momentum.
signatureMotif: high-contrast headlines, sharp gradients, and velocity-driven proof blocks
promptHints: Favor momentum, value velocity, and conversion tension over soft hospitality aesthetics.
Above the fold should feel product-led and energetic without collapsing into generic SaaS blue.

layouts: Use an asymmetric hero with oversized left-aligned headline, stacked CTAs, and a tilted product screenshot card anchored to the right.
Place a tight logo strip above three horizontal proof stats, then a feature grid of dark cards with one accent-highlighted centerpiece.
Build a comparison section as a two-column split: punchy value copy on the left, benchmark metrics or migration wins on the right.
Use a three-tier pricing block with the middle plan raised, glowing subtly, and framed by compact launch-oriented trust notes below.
Compose the final CTA as a narrow high-contrast banner with urgent copy, inline email capture, and compressed social proof badges.
motifs: Use near-black surfaces with electric magenta-to-cyan gradient accents, large white headlines, and luminous buttons that feel fast rather than glossy.
Favor 1rem rounded cards, faint border strokes, and soft radial glow spills behind screenshots or key conversion modules.
Show product momentum through angled UI mockups, rapid metric chips, and compact proof blocks that look stacked for launch week.
Keep typography bold and geometric, with short headline lines, dense supporting copy, and labels in all-caps micro text.
antiPatterns: Avoid soft pastel illustrations, roomy lifestyle photography, or hospitality-led compositions that weaken the launch-energy tone.
Never default to generic SaaS blue gradients or friendly blob shapes; this variant needs sharper contrast and more distinctive tension.
Avoid oversized testimonial carousels or long narrative sections above pricing; momentum should stay product-led and conversion-tight.
Do not use flat white cards on light backgrounds or airy whitespace-heavy layouts that erase the dark, high-velocity signature.

themeTokens.bodyBackgroundImage: radial-gradient(circle at top left, color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-primary) 18%, transparent) 0%, transparent 32%), radial-gradient(circle at bottom right, color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-accent) 14%, transparent) 0%, transparent 30%)
